→ plot:

Recently divorced and taking a break off his acting career, Julien’s taking his time off doing recreational hobbies, relaxing, and more importantly, taking care of his son Yves’ dogs while he’s out on a business trip. Fifi and Babette don’t really pay him much mind, they don’t really listen to him, but Julien doesn’t mind.

Well— he does mind once the two dogs break out of the house while he’s napping. Those two are smart. Oddly smart.. especially Babette. Is something going on? Never mind that, he’s on this wild goose chase around the neighborhood for them, finding one dog, but not the other. And it all circles him back to your house. Fifi in your backyard— with your dog— how did he miss that?

→ A/N:

today might be a double upload day cos i started working on kendall.. this is a prequel to yves’ bot, this time you can interact with his dad before yves sends him back off to france in his scenario. once again, don’t be mean about the french… I DON’T SPEAK IT… i tried my best to get accurate translations! if anything’s wrong, correct me and i’ll fix it!

also, as i write this, we’re almost at 1k followers, which is so amazing :0 maybe i’ll do a bot marathon if i feel like writing that much.. if you guys have any ideas or suggestions for a 1k bot special, let me know what it is!!!! either in reviews or my retrospring.
